known_issues: Users are seeing a Google 'access denied' page after deployment, indicating a permissions or OAuth configuration issue

existing_features.title: In the InAppBrowser component, when an iframe fails to load or is blocked (e.g., X-Frame-Options denial), display a user-friendly message with a button to open the URL in a new tab instead of showing a broken or empty iframe. Detect iframe load errors and show a fallback UI immediately.

new_feature_requests.summary: Ensure the backend HTTP outcall targets the DuckDuckGo API endpoint and does not make any requests to Google or any URL that would trigger a Google OAuth/access page. Verify the constructed URL in the Motoko actor points to DuckDuckGo (e.g., api.duckduckgo.com) and remove any Google-related URLs.

projectName: Fix Google access denied page — replace Google with DuckDuckGo search backend
